label: Color for stuff
description: Overrides the tint color of a thing when it is built from a specific stuff material.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: ThingDef reference for the stuff material this color override applies to.

color.label: Color
color.description: Tint color applied to the thing when built from the specified stuff. Format: (r, g, b, a) with components in 0–1 range.
